title: Overheat
description: The Nether is heating up! Can you beat the heat? Or will you burn alive in this hellish environment?
body:
The Nether is a really hot place but have you always found it odd that you can just... walk around in the nether just fine and not worry about burning alive due to the extreme heat of being in literal HELL? Well with Overheat, that all changes!

**_You can contact me with feedback by messaging "dustfired" on Discord! State that you come from Modrinth or I will think you're a scammer!_**

_**This datapack/mod is NOT recommended for new players! This only serves to increase the difficulty of the game!**_

Inspired by _**Tough as Nails**_, this vanilla friendly datapack/mod makes the Nether a bit more of a dangerous place!
- A _hidden_ meter will begin to build up the moment you enter the Nether with various warnings/audio cues as this meter increases. If the meter maxes out you will begin to rapidly take burning damage until you burn to death, leave the Nether, or decrease the meter!

**_"How do you decrease this meter and survive in the Nether?"_** **you may ask?**
- **Limit your time in the Nether, bring water bottles/other potions, or just bring fire resistance potions** for extended stays in the Nether! Drinking potions reduces your heat meter by a flat amount!
- **Upon leaving the Nether your heat meter will rapidly decrease** but it will take some time before it fully goes back to empty! _Fire Protection and Frost Walker enchantments decrease the meter even faster!_
- **Fire Resistance potions stop the heat meter from ticking entirely** and if your heat meter is partially filled, having Fire Resistance will decrease the meter by half the rate of what it would when you leave the Nether for the duration of the Fire Resistance effect. _This overrides bonuses provided by Fire Resistance and Frost Walker enchantments and takes priority!_
- **It takes 5 minutes for your heat meter to fully max out** when you enter the nether. Making sure you are given a fair amount of time should you first be entering the nether in a new world. Warnings will be displayed as the meter progresses along with audio cues.
- **Fire Protection and Frost Walker enchantments are your friends here!** Enchanting armor with those enchantments can slow down the rate at which the meter increases allowing for longer stays in the nether without Fire Resistance! _They even can sometimes delay how quickly you burn to death if your meter is maxed!_
- **Being on fire or standing on magma blocks doubles the rate at which your heat meter raises!** _If you're on fire and standing on magma blocks both effects stack for triple the rate!_
- **Falling into lava without Fire Resistance will INSTANTLY max out the meter**! _This only applies if this occurs within the nether._

**_Planned Future Features:_**
- Negative effects will occur if your meter reaches certain thresholds (Not sure about this one)
